name: Cheesy Garden Tuna-Filled Crepes (Microwave R
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the crepes.
2. Place broccoli in a 1 1/2 quart microwave-safe casserole dish. Cover and microwave as directed on the package; drain.
3. Stir in 1 1/2 cups cheese and the remaining ingredients (tuna, celery, onion, frozen broccoli).
4. Microwave covered on high for 1 minute.
5. Spoon the mixture onto the crepes and roll them up.
6. Arrange the rolled crepes in a square microwave dish, 8 x 8 x 2 inches; sprinkle with the remaining cheese.
7. Cover loosely with plastic wrap and microwave on high until the cheese is melted, 2 to 3 minutes.
4 Servings.
